title: Shiva’s Cosmic Dance in the Universe in Char Dham Vrindavan.jpg
source_url: https://commons.wikimedia.org/wiki/File:Shiva’s Cosmic Dance in the Universe in Char Dham Vrindavan.jpg
description: Another magnificent artwork of Lord Shiva in the Nataraja form, dancing amidst stars and galaxies, symbolizing his role as the eternal cosmic dancer of creation and destruction.
